data.title: Flowtech Fluidpower Issues Circular on Fundraising, Acquisition and Capital Changes
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Flowtech Fluidpower ( (GB:FLO) ) has shared an announcement.

Flowtech Fluidpower has published a shareholder circular detailing its recently announced fundraising, a related acquisition, and a proposed capital reorganisation, alongside notice of a general meeting to seek investor approvals on 6 February 2026. The company is also broadening investor engagement by making the general meeting accessible online via the Investor Meet Company platform for both existing and potential shareholders, although voting will remain offline, signalling a push for greater transparency and participation around its strategic and capital structure changes.

The most recent analyst rating on (GB:FLO) stock is a Hold with a £58.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Flowtech Fluidpower stock, see the GB:FLO Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on GB:FLO Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, GB:FLO is a Neutral.

Flowtech Fluidpower’s overall stock score reflects significant financial challenges, particularly in profitability and revenue trends. While technical indicators show bearish momentum, recent corporate events provide a positive outlook with revenue growth and improved sales pipeline. However, the negative P/E ratio and lack of dividend yield weigh heavily on its valuation.

To see Spark’s full report on GB:FLO stock, click here.

More about Flowtech Fluidpower

Flowtech Fluidpower PLC is an AIM-listed specialist in fluid power and motion control solutions, supplying hydraulic and pneumatic components and related services to industrial customers through a multi-channel distribution and engineering-led model. The company targets a broad range of end markets where reliable fluid power systems are critical to operations, positioning itself as a key supplier within the UK and European industrial supply chain.

Average Trading Volume: 110,501

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: £37.66M

data.title: Lisata Therapeutics Agrees to All-Cash Acquisition by Kuva
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

An announcement from Lisata Therapeutics ( (LSTA) ) is now available.

On January 20–21, 2026, Lisata Therapeutics announced it had entered into a binding term sheet with privately held Kuva Labs for a negotiated acquisition via an all‑cash tender offer of $4.00 per share, to be followed by a short‑form merger, with Lisata stockholders also eligible for two non‑tradeable contingent value rights worth up to an additional $2.00 per share upon achieving specified certepetide‑related milestones. The offer, unanimously approved by both companies’ boards and expected to be formalized in a definitive purchase agreement before February 27, 2026, represents roughly an 85% premium to Lisata’s most recent closing price, or about 180% including the CVRs, and is structured with exclusivity, standstill and break‑up fee provisions that protect both parties while allowing Lisata to consider superior competing bids; the deal underscores the strategic value Kuva sees in Lisata’s certepetide‑based oncology platform and could deliver a substantial liquidity event for shareholders if the tender offer and subsequent merger close as planned.

The most recent analyst rating on (LSTA) stock is a Hold with a $2.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Lisata Therapeutics stock, see the LSTA Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on LSTA Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, LSTA is a Neutral.

The score is held down primarily by weak financial performance (tiny revenue base, large losses, and ongoing cash burn) and bearish technicals (below key moving averages with negative MACD). Offsetting factors include a debt-free balance sheet and a more constructive earnings update featuring expense reductions, a cash runway into early 2027, and positive clinical/partnership milestones, though Phase III funding needs remain a key risk.

To see Spark’s full report on LSTA stock, click here.

More about Lisata Therapeutics

Lisata Therapeutics, based in Basking Ridge, N.J., is a clinical‑stage pharmaceutical company focused on discovering, developing and commercializing innovative therapies for advanced solid tumors and other serious diseases. Its lead cyclic peptide candidate, certepetide (formerly LSTA1), is designed to activate a tumor‑specific uptake pathway to improve penetration and effectiveness of co‑administered or tethered anti‑cancer drugs, and has received multiple U.S. and EU regulatory designations, including Fast Track and Orphan Drug status in several oncology indications. Lisata leverages its CendR Platform technology through commercial and R&D partnerships and is advancing a pipeline of programs it expects to fund into early 2027.

Average Trading Volume: 69,862

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Sell

Current Market Cap: $19.05M

data.description:

Skanska AB ( ($SE:SKA.B) ) has shared an update.

Skanska has been included in Fortune magazine’s list of the world’s “Most Admired Companies,” a high-profile global recognition of corporate reputation based on an international survey conducted with Korn Ferry. The ranking, derived from evaluations by executives, board members and analysts across nine criteria such as management quality, product quality, investment value, social responsibility and talent attraction, highlights Skanska’s emphasis on responsible business practices, long-term value creation, sustainability and operational excellence. The company’s leadership views the accolade as validation that its strategy and values are competitive globally, reinforcing Skanska’s positioning as a governance-strong, sustainability-focused player within the construction and project development industry and underscoring its reputation among industry peers and decision-makers worldwide.

The most recent analyst rating on ($SE:SKA.B) stock is a Hold with a SEK301.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Skanska AB stock, see the SE:SKA.B Stock Forecast page.

More about Skanska AB

Skanska Group is one of the world’s largest construction and project development companies, generating SEK 177 billion in revenue in 2024. Operating across selected markets in the Nordics, Europe and the United States, the company leverages the expertise of roughly 26,300 employees to deliver innovative, sustainable solutions that shape how people live, work and connect, with a strong emphasis on healthy, long-term urban development.

data.title: Aya Gold & Silver Lifts Moroccan Reserves and Resources on Back of Aggressive 2025 Drilling
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Aya Gold & Silver ( (TSE:AYA) ) has provided an update.

Aya Gold & Silver reported a strong 2025 exploration campaign at its Zgounder and Boumadine properties in Morocco, where over 175,000 metres of drilling delivered multiple high-grade silver and silver-equivalent intercepts and supported both reserve and resource growth. At Zgounder, the company exceeded its drilling targets, confirmed significant mineralization at depth and along strike, and increased proven and probable silver reserves to 73 million ounces and measured and indicated resources to 100 million ounces, while expanding its exploration footprint through six additional permits. At Boumadine, Aya completed more than 150,000 metres of drilling, reported standout polymetallic intercepts across the main trend and the Tizi zone, delivered an updated mineral resource estimate showing a 19% increase in indicated resources, and added 10 new permits, underscoring substantial growth potential that is not yet fully captured in current resource figures and reinforcing the company’s position as a leading silver explorer in Morocco.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:AYA) stock is a Buy with a C$27.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Aya Gold & Silver stock, see the TSE:AYA Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on TSE:AYA Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, TSE:AYA is a Neutral.

Aya Gold & Silver’s strong technical indicators and positive earnings call contribute significantly to its score. However, high valuation concerns and profitability challenges weigh down the overall score. The company’s robust growth and operational performance are promising, but financial efficiency and cost management need improvement.

To see Spark’s full report on TSE:AYA stock, click here.

More about Aya Gold & Silver

Aya Gold & Silver Inc. is a precious metals mining and exploration company focused on silver and polymetallic deposits in the Kingdom of Morocco. Its primary assets include the Zgounder Silver Mine and the Boumadine project, where it is expanding its land position through new exploration permits and intensive drilling to grow reserves and resources and create shareholder value.

Average Trading Volume: 1,528,333

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: C$3.3B

data.title: ATEX Accelerates Warrant Expiry, Opening Path to C$52.6 Million in Proceeds
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

The latest announcement is out from ATEX Resources Inc ( (TSE:ATX) ).

ATEX Resources has triggered the acceleration clause on 21,057,477 common share purchase warrants issued in November 2024, after its shares traded above the required C$3.00 volume-weighted average price threshold for 20 consecutive trading days on the TSX Venture Exchange. Warrant holders now have until February 20, 2026, to exercise at C$2.50 per share, after which any unexercised warrants will be cancelled, potentially generating gross proceeds of approximately C$52.6 million that could bolster the company’s financial flexibility as it advances its Valeriano copper-gold project in Chile’s emerging Link Belt district.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:ATX) stock is a Hold with a C$4.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on ATEX Resources Inc stock, see the TSE:ATX Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on TSE:ATX Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, TSE:ATX is a Neutral.

The score is held back primarily by weak financial performance (no revenue, widening losses, and increased cash burn), despite a low-debt balance sheet. Offsetting factors include strong technical momentum (price above key moving averages with positive MACD) and supportive corporate events (notably strong drilling/results momentum and substantial financing to fund project expansion). Valuation remains constrained by ongoing losses and no indicated dividend support.

To see Spark’s full report on TSE:ATX stock, click here.

More about ATEX Resources Inc

ATEX Resources Inc. is a mineral exploration company focused on the Valeriano Copper-Gold Project in Chile’s Atacama Region, within an emerging copper-gold porphyry belt that links the El Indio and Maricunga districts. The project hosts a large, high-grade copper-gold porphyry resource with both indicated and inferred mineral resources, positioning ATEX among a cluster of major copper-gold deposits in a developing Andean mining corridor.

Average Trading Volume: 533,922

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: C$1.28B

Find detailed analytics on ATX stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: BTQ Teams With ITRI to Validate Quantum-Secure QCIM Chip in Silicon
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

The latest update is out from BTQ Technologies ( (TSE:BTQ) ).

BTQ Technologies has entered a strategic 2026 collaboration with Taiwan’s Industrial Technology Research Institute to realize and validate its Quantum Compute In Memory (QCIM) security chip in silicon, marking a key milestone in advancing energy-efficient, post-quantum cryptographic hardware. The partnership will benchmark QCIM’s performance, power efficiency and feasibility at the silicon level, de-risking architecture choices, accelerating product development and integration decisions, and underpinning BTQ’s broader commercialization strategy alongside its separate chipset work with ICTK, as governments and enterprises seek scalable quantum-secure infrastructure for demanding real-world environments.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:BTQ) stock is a Hold with a C$0.09 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on BTQ Technologies stock, see the TSE:BTQ Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on TSE:BTQ Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, TSE:BTQ is a Neutral.

The score is primarily held back by very weak profitability and materially negative operating/free cash flow despite improving results year over year. A debt-free balance sheet provides some support, but valuation remains constrained by losses and technical signals indicate limited trend strength with extreme momentum readings.

To see Spark’s full report on TSE:BTQ stock, click here.

More about BTQ Technologies

BTQ Technologies is a global quantum technology company specializing in securing mission-critical networks through post-quantum cryptographic hardware and platforms. Its core efforts include developing quantum-secure, energy-efficient semiconductor solutions such as the Quantum Compute In Memory (QCIM) chip, targeting applications across critical infrastructure, secure communications, financial systems, and edge computing where long-term security and performance are essential.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

Current Market Cap: C$7.87M

data.title: Hainan Drinda to Raise HK$398 Million via Placing of New H Shares for Space PV and Aerospace Expansion
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Hainan Drinda New Energy Technology Co., Ltd. Class H ( (HK:2865) ) has issued an update.

Hainan Drinda New Energy Technology has entered into a placing agreement with placing agents to issue up to 18,682,000 new H shares at HK$22.00 each under its existing general mandate, representing about 29.45% of its current issued H shares and 6.42% of total issued shares, with no additional shareholder approval required. If fully placed, the transaction is expected to raise approximately HK$397.7 million in net proceeds, which the company plans to allocate mainly to the development and production of space photovoltaic battery-related products (about 45%), equity investment and cooperation in the commercial aerospace sector (about 45%), and general working capital (about 10%), potentially strengthening its financial resources and positioning in high-growth aerospace-related energy applications, though completion remains subject to conditions and is not guaranteed.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:2865) stock is a Buy with a HK$52.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Hainan Drinda New Energy Technology Co., Ltd. Class H stock, see the HK:2865 Stock Forecast page.

More about Hainan Drinda New Energy Technology Co., Ltd. Class H

Hainan Drinda New Energy Technology Co., Ltd. is a PRC-incorporated joint stock company listed in Hong Kong that operates in the new energy sector, with a strategic focus on research, development and production of photovoltaic technologies, including space photovoltaic battery-related products, and equity investments and cooperation in the commercial aerospace industry.

data.title: Basel Medical Group Completes US$6.5 Million Acquisition of Bethesda Medical
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

An update from Basel Medical Group Ltd ( (BMGL) ) is now available.

On April 11, 2025, Basel Medical Group Ltd’s subsidiary, Basel Medical Group Pte. Ltd., agreed to acquire all the issued shares of Bethesda Medical Pte. Ltd., a Singapore-incorporated medical company, from Silkroute Biomed Healthcare Pte. Ltd., and the transaction was completed on April 30, 2025, making Bethesda Medical a wholly owned indirect subsidiary. Basel Medical Group paid US$6.5 million upon completion, and the parties later agreed to waive the remaining US$1.5 million in deferred consideration, effectively fixing the total acquisition price at US$6.5 million, a move that consolidates the group’s control over Bethesda Medical while potentially improving the financial terms and strengthening its position in the Singapore healthcare services market.

More about Basel Medical Group Ltd

Basel Medical Group Ltd is a Singapore-based healthcare company that operates through subsidiaries to provide medical services, with a focus on expanding its footprint in the local medical and clinical services market through strategic acquisitions.

Average Trading Volume: 86,720

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Sell

Current Market Cap: $15.57M
